title: More Nonsense Limerick 26
content:
There was an old man who screamed out
    Whenever they knocked him about:
    So they took off his boots, 
    And fed him with fruits,
    And continued to knock him about.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 26" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
